chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1624 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For direction For hearing of CMA No.3659/2020 (C/A) 24.11.2022 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Haq Nawaz Alvi (Focal Person on behalf of Secretary Irrigation, Government of Sindh)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- By means of listed application, the petitioner seeks initiating of contempt proceedings against the proposed contemnors for allegedly not making compliance of order dated 27.02.2022, whereby the petition was dismissed as not pressed with direction to respondent No.4 / Secretary Irrigation Department, Government of Sindh Karachi to decide the departmental appeal/representation claiming seniority within a period of sixty days. Today, learned A.A.G., Sindh files through statement copy of the notification, which reflects that he aforesaid order of this Court has been complied with by granting the petitioner proforma promotion to the post of Chief Engineer (Civil) (BS-20), Irrigation Department; hence, the listed application being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
